messages.content: You are a helpful, precise assistant.

Give me exactly 4 steps to cook a 2-egg omelet for one person in a 10-inch nonstick pan. Provide exact quantities (grams/ml) for eggs, butter, salt, and optional water or milk; precise pan preheat level on a 0–10 electric stove scale; timings in seconds for each phase (stirring, setting, folding/rolling); and brief pan/hand movements and fold angle in degrees. No extra commentary—exactly four concise steps with quantities, times, heat, and motions.
